texto: Apparently, it can be easy to forget that other people have minds with the same general capacities and experiences as your own. Once seen as lacking the ability to reason, to choose freely, or to feel, a person is considered something less than human.
explicacao: Citação de Nicholas Epley sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Apparently, it can be easy to forget that other people have minds with the same general capacitie…” articula reflexao, empathy, mind em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mind e psychology.
